last_episode_to_air.name: Oblivion
last_episode_to_air.overview: Shaken, the family confronts the deadly mysteries of the Hotel Oblivion — and the growing suspicion that their mission is not what it seems.

name: The Umbrella Academy

next_episode_to_air.name: The Unbearable Tragedy of Getting What You Want

overview: A dysfunctional family of superheroes comes together to solve the mystery of their father's death, the threat of the apocalypse and more.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Reunited by their father's death, estranged siblings with extraordinary powers uncover shocking family secrets -- and a looming threat to humanity.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Blasted back in time to 1960s Dallas, the scattered siblings build new lives for themselves — until a new doomsday threat pulls them back together.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: Back at the Academy, the Umbrellas clash with a new squad of Hargreeves siblings as a mysterious force begins to wreak havoc on the city.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview: In the final season, the Hargreeves siblings face their toughest challenges yet as they navigate a timeline without their powers. As new enemies emerge with the intent to erase them from existence, the siblings must band together to overcome their greatest threat. Amidst the chaos, they uncover deeper secrets about their family and the true intentions of their father, Reginald Hargreeves. With the stakes higher than ever, they must find a way to restore their powers and protect their legacy, leading to a climactic showdown that will determine their fate.

tagline: Too many siblings. Not enough timeline.

episodes.name: We Only See Each Other at Weddings and Funerals
episodes.overview: Years after they rose to fame as young crime-fighting superheroes, the estranged Hargreeves siblings come together to mark their father's death.

episodes.name: Run Boy Run
episodes.overview: After sharing the story of his time travel with Vanya, Five hunts for the owner of a fake eye. But two mysterious assassins are hot on his trail.

episodes.name: Extra Ordinary
episodes.overview: Worried their mother is hiding something, Luther and Allison call a family meeting. Cha-Cha and Hazel catch a big break in their hunt for Five.

episodes.name: Man on the Moon
episodes.overview: The story of Luther's transformation emerges. At the motel, Klaus puts Hazel and Cha-Cha's training to the test. Allison grows suspicious of Leonard.

episodes.name: Number Five
episodes.overview: Five lets Luther in on his secret, Klaus returns from a harrowing trip through time, and Vanya begins to feel different without her meds.

episodes.name: The Day That Wasn't
episodes.overview: Sparks fly when Vanya finds her siblings holding an emergency family meeting without her. Five starts his new job at HQ. Cha-Cha faces a dilemma.

episodes.name: The Day That Was
episodes.overview: With a second chance at the day, the siblings team up to find the mysterious "Harold Jenkins." Leonard takes Vanya into the woods to test her powers.

guest_stars.character: Lady Who Takes Bus to Rave
guest_stars.name: Heather Sanderson

episodes.name: I Heard a Rumor
episodes.overview: As Vanya practices controlling her new abilities, Allison tags along with a local cop to find out what happened outside the restaurant.

episodes.name: Changes
episodes.overview: Vanya veers between shock and despair as she makes a string of unsettling discoveries. A serendipitous development leaves Five at loose ends.

episodes.name: The White Violin
episodes.overview: As a lifetime of secrets and resentment bring the Umbrella Academy crashing down, the Hargreeves siblings realize the worst is still to come.

1.name: Season 1
1.overview: Reunited by their father's death, estranged siblings with extraordinary powers uncover shocking family secrets -- and a looming threat to humanity.

episodes.name: Right Back Where We Started
episodes.overview: After dropping his siblings into an alley in Dallas — in different years — Five scrambles to track them all down and stop a new doomsday threat.

episodes.name: The Frankel Footage
episodes.overview: An incident at the bar leads Luther to Vanya. Five finds an unsettling surprise in the film Hazel left behind. The cops come after Allison's husband.

episodes.name: The Swedish Job
episodes.overview: As the sit-in approaches, Allison reconnects with Klaus, the Swedes chase Vanya into a cornfield, and Luther makes a distressing discovery.

episodes.name: The Majestic 12
episodes.overview: While Allison searches frantically for Ray, Vanya contends with a crisis at the farm, and Five, Diego, and Lila crash a party at the Mexican Consulate.

episodes.name: Valhalla
episodes.overview: Summoned to an emergency meeting, the siblings hatch very different plans for how to spend their last six days on Earth. Lila confronts her mother.

episodes.name: A Light Supper
episodes.overview: Allison gives Ray a peek at her powers, Dave visits Klaus's compound, the Handler offers Five a deal, and the siblings meet their father for dinner.

episodes.name: Öga for Öga
episodes.overview: After Five travels to 1982 to carry out his new mission, the siblings face a flurry of difficult decisions. Carl issues a warning to Vanya.

episodes.name: The Seven Stages
episodes.overview: A desperate Five concocts a risky plan to intercept another version of himself. The FBI tortures Vanya. Diego discovers what causes the apocalypse.
As the Fives plot against each other, one of the siblings makes a big sacrifice to help Vanya, and Lila learns the truth about her parents.

episodes.name: The End of Something
episodes.overview: Reeling from the events at Dealey Plaza, the siblings head to the farm to help save Harlan — only to find themselves drawn into a deadly showdown.

2.name: Season 2
2.overview: Blasted back in time to 1960s Dallas, the scattered siblings build new lives for themselves — until a new doomsday threat pulls them back together.

episodes.name: Meet the Family
episodes.overview: After averting a doomsday in Dallas, the Umbrella siblings return to a very different Academy — now ruled by the powerful and hostile Sparrows.

episodes.name: World's Biggest Ball of Twine
episodes.overview: With their Number One missing, the Sparrows take a hostage. Allison makes a painful discovery. Klaus takes Five on an eye-opening road trip.

episodes.name: Pocket Full of Lightning
episodes.overview: As people start disappearing in waves, Five and Lila reluctantly team up to solve their time-travel problem. Klaus sees a new side of his father.

episodes.name: Kugelblitz
episodes.overview: Luther and Sloane hatch a plan to end the war between the families. Viktor reconnects with someone from the past. Five has an unsettling encounter.

episodes.name: Kindest Cut
episodes.overview: Klaus's relationship with death proves more complicated than anyone knew. Viktor finally learns what happened to the Umbrellas' mothers.

episodes.name: Marigold
episodes.overview: Five chases down Pogo, Viktor and Harlan attempt a transfer of powers, and Diego and Lila venture beyond the wall of the White Buffalo Suite.

episodes.name: Auf Wiedersehen
episodes.overview: In 1989, Lila digs up one of her mother's secrets. The families join forces to fight the Kugelblitz. Reginald teaches Klaus to harness his powers.

episodes.name: Wedding at the End of the World
episodes.overview: With the universe collapsing around them, the gang gathers for a day of romance, awkwardness and debauchery at the Hotel Obsidian.

episodes.name: Seven Bells
episodes.overview: Reginald goes all out to convince the children to sign on to his plan. Five tries to recover a drunken memory. Allison has a change of heart.

episodes.name: Oblivion
episodes.overview: Shaken, the family confronts the deadly mysteries of the Hotel Oblivion — and the growing suspicion that their mission is not what it seems.

3.name: Season 3
3.overview: Back at the Academy, the Umbrellas clash with a new squad of Hargreeves siblings as a mysterious force begins to wreak havoc on the city.

episodes.name: The Unbearable Tragedy of Getting What You Want
Six Years, Five Months, and Two Days

4.name: Season 4
4.overview: In the final season, the Hargreeves siblings face their toughest challenges yet as they navigate a timeline without their powers. As new enemies emerge with the intent to erase them from existence, the siblings must band together to overcome their greatest threat. Amidst the chaos, they uncover deeper secrets about their family and the true intentions of their father, Reginald Hargreeves. With the stakes higher than ever, they must find a way to restore their powers and protect their legacy, leading to a climactic showdown that will determine their fate.
